title: Jukebox GUI
description: This mod lets you manage your jukeboxes with a dedicated GUI.
body:
![Jukebox GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5660e856686d070ca2b58e69b90b7273aef11972.gif)
FEATURES
Jukebox Management ScreenDisplays an interactive GUI for the vanilla Jukebox
Disc SlotInsert and eject music discs directly from the interface
Song Title DisplayShows the Artist and Title of the currently loaded disc, animates in rainbow colors while playing and turns black when stopped
Digital TimerDisplays elapsed time and total song duration in MM:SS format
Playback ControlsPause and resume your music at any time with dedicated control buttons
ThemesTwo visual themes to choose from, each with a unique style and playback display
HOW TO USE
- ![Shift](https://img.shields.io/badge/Shift-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![+](https://img.shields.io/badge/+-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff)![Right Click](https://img.shields.io/badge/Right%20Click-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff) a Jukebox while holding nothing or any item to open the JukeboxGUI screen. - Drag a music disc into the disc slot to start playback. - Click the pause button to pause the track and freeze the timer. Click the play button to resume from where you left off. - Click the theme toggle button in the top right corner to switch between Theme 1 and Theme 2. - Click the disc in the slot to eject it and stop playback. - Close the GUI at any time. Music continues and the timer keeps running in the background. - Reopen the GUI to see the updated elapsed time. Regular Right-Click (without sneaking) inserts or ejects discs the vanilla way. The GUI will still reflect the correct playback state when opened afterward.
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and server, requiring the mod to be installed on both sides.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
